name: X: Profile Posts
description: Open one X handle's profile timeline in a fresh tab and return up to 20 posts from the Posts tab. Use for a quick read of what an author has posted recently. Do not use when you also need replies, or posts within a specific date range (use `x_search_posts` with a date window).

browser_automation.description: Navigates a fresh tab to https://x.com/{handle}, scrolls to accumulate ~20 post cards, then returns a structured digest.

sequences.name: x_profile_posts
sequences.description: Open profile -> scroll -> extract post cards.

steps.name: Open the profile Posts tab in a fresh tab
Allow the profile page to hydrate
Wait for post cards
steps.selector: main article[data-testid='tweet'], main [data-testid='cellInnerDiv'] article, main article

steps.name: Scroll until roughly 20 posts are visible
steps.item_selector: main article[data-testid='tweet'], main [data-testid='cellInnerDiv'] article, main article

steps.name: Extract profile posts
steps.item_selector: main article[data-testid='tweet'], main [data-testid='cellInnerDiv'] article, main article

help.summary: Return up to 20 posts from one X handle's profile timeline.

examples.description: Return up to 20 of @elonmusk's most recent posts.

help.returns: Array of post cards with author, text, posted_at, post_url, reply_count, repost_count, like_count, view_count.
notes: Opens a fresh tab for parallel-safe execution.
